ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company name (if applicable) */,
  "vat_number" TEXT /* VAT number (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salesmen" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salesman */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the salesman */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the salesman */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the salesman */,
  "commission_rate" TEXT /* Commission rate for the salesman */,
  "team" TEXT /* Sales team (if applicable) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Sales region (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed, pending) */,
  "transaction_fee" TEXT /* Transaction fee (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status update */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the order status was updated */,
  "status_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the order status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_notes" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order note */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional note about the order */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date and time when the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping option */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier (e.g., USPS, UPS, FedEx) */,
  "service" TEXT /* Shipping service (e.g., ground, air, express) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the shipping option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
